text:

Author: amdmi3

Log:
  - Drop ARCH condition for removing -m32 flag: on i386 it's no-op anyway
  - Drop ONLY_FOR_ARCHS, it builds fine on arm, mips and mips64, however not sure if it's usable there
  - Switch to options helpers
